mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ingestion_jobs (id, workspace_id, document_id, job_type, status) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{workspaceId}, #{documentId}, 'DOCUMENT', 'PENDING') ON CONFLICT (document_id, job_type) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE documents SET status = 'PROCESSING', failure_reason = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE workspace_id = #{workspaceId} AND id = #{documentId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED')
UPDATE ingestion_jobs SET node_logs = node_logs || CAST(#{nodeLogJson} AS jsonb), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
